text.message: ive a 2/12 and with basically no sheep, wheat or brick

not targeting youre just in the best position by far
we cant keep giving blue nbs

No way u thought I'm the target there
i fro sure think youre the target
you have the best wheat and ore and port
cant control that he got 5 rolls in a row
or the fact you wasted your wheat and ore and didnt buy an early city when the rolls came
7s went dry a lot of a sudden nice
Red was blind with anger at me for some reason
